evidence_quotes.quote: end of service/destruction of videogames that have been sold

paragraphs.text: It would be great to include protection against the end of service/destruction of videogames that have been sold and by decisions of the company no longer are recieving support. When a company decides they no longer want their game to be played they could left it in a completely unplayable state resulting in a product that no longer does or accomplish what the consumer has already paid for. This could be solved by adding a stable build so the people could keep playing or other tools to ensure that without the company support the product is still in a playable state. I just want to be able to keep enjoying the product I already payed for.
